mapper.select: select id, xh, year, month, years, empname, sex, entrytime, dept, post, normaldays, absencehours, overtime, basicsalary, postsalary, dutiessalary, hightempsalary, lowtempsalary, nightshiftsalary, othersalary, fullattendancesalary, absencesalary, totalsalary, tax, social, accumulation, otherdeduction, unionfees, actualitysalary, signuser, createtime from hrm_salary_export where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into hrm_salary_export(xh, year, month, years, empname, sex, entrytime, dept, post, normaldays, absencehours, overtime, basicsalary, postsalary, dutiessalary, hightempsalary, lowtempsalary, nightshiftsalary, othersalary, fullattendancesalary, absencesalary, totalsalary, tax, social, accumulation, otherdeduction, unionfees, actualitysalary, signuser, createtime,overtimesalary) values (#{xh}, #{year}, #{month}, #{years}, #{empname}, #{sex}, #{entrytime}, #{dept}, #{post}, #{normaldays}, #{absencehours}, #{overtime}, #{basicsalary}, #{postsalary}, #{dutiessalary}, #{hightempsalary}, #{lowtempsalary}, #{nightshiftsalary}, #{othersalary}, #{fullattendancesalary}, #{absencesalary}, #{totalsalary}, #{tax}, #{social}, #{accumulation}, #{otherdeduction}, #{unionfees}, #{actualitysalary}, #{signuser}, getdate(),#{overtimesalary})

insert into hrm_salary_export(xh, year, month, years, empname, sex, entrytime, dept, post, normaldays, absencehours, overtime, basicsalary, postsalary, dutiessalary, hightempsalary, lowtempsalary, nightshiftsalary, othersalary, fullattendancesalary, absencesalary, totalsalary, tax, social, accumulation, otherdeduction, unionfees, actualitysalary,performance, signuser, createtime) values
(#{entity.xh}, #{entity.year}, #{entity.month}, #{entity.years}, #{entity.empname}, #{entity.sex}, #{entity.entrytime}, #{entity.dept}, #{entity.post}, #{entity.normaldays}, #{entity.absencehours}, #{entity.overtime}, #{entity.basicsalary}, #{entity.postsalary}, #{entity.dutiessalary}, #{entity.hightempsalary}, #{entity.lowtempsalary}, #{entity.nightshiftsalary}, #{entity.othersalary}, #{entity.fullattendancesalary}, #{entity.absencesalary}, #{entity.totalsalary}, #{entity.tax}, #{entity.social}, #{entity.accumulation}, #{entity.otherdeduction}, #{entity.unionfees}, #{entity.actualitysalary},#{entity.performance}, #{entity.signuser}, now())

insert into hrm_salary_export(xh, year, month, years, empname, sex, entrytime, dept, post, normaldays, absencehours, overtime, basicsalary, postsalary, dutiessalary, hightempsalary, lowtempsalary, nightshiftsalary, othersalary, fullattendancesalary, absencesalary, totalsalary, tax, social, accumulation, otherdeduction, unionfees, actualitysalary, signuser, createtime) values
(#{entity.xh}, #{entity.year}, #{entity.month}, #{entity.years}, #{entity.empname}, #{entity.sex}, #{entity.entrytime}, #{entity.dept}, #{entity.post}, #{entity.normaldays}, #{entity.absencehours}, #{entity.overtime}, #{entity.basicsalary}, #{entity.postsalary}, #{entity.dutiessalary}, #{entity.hightempsalary}, #{entity.lowtempsalary}, #{entity.nightshiftsalary}, #{entity.othersalary}, #{entity.fullattendancesalary}, #{entity.absencesalary}, #{entity.totalsalary}, #{entity.tax}, #{entity.social}, #{entity.accumulation}, #{entity.otherdeduction}, #{entity.unionfees}, #{entity.actualitysalary}, #{entity.signuser}, #{entity.createtime})
on duplicate key update xh = values(xh), year = values(year), month = values(month), years = values(years), empname = values(empname), sex = values(sex), entrytime = values(entrytime), dept = values(dept), post = values(post), normaldays = values(normaldays), absencehours = values(absencehours), overtime = values(overtime), basicsalary = values(basicsalary), postsalary = values(postsalary), dutiessalary = values(dutiessalary), hightempsalary = values(hightempsalary), lowtempsalary = values(lowtempsalary), nightshiftsalary = values(nightshiftsalary), othersalary = values(othersalary), fullattendancesalary = values(fullattendancesalary), absencesalary = values(absencesalary), totalsalary = values(totalsalary), tax = values(tax), social = values(social), accumulation = values(accumulation), otherdeduction = values(otherdeduction), unionfees = values(unionfees), actualitysalary = values(actualitysalary), signuser = values(signuser), createtime = values(createtime)
mapper.update:
update hrm_salary_export
xh = #{xh},
year = #{year},
month = #{month},
years = #{years},
empname = #{empname},
sex = #{sex},
entrytime = #{entrytime},
dept = #{dept},
post = #{post},
normaldays = #{normaldays},
absencehours = #{absencehours},
overtime = #{overtime},
basicsalary = #{basicsalary},
postsalary = #{postsalary},
dutiessalary = #{dutiessalary},
hightempsalary = #{hightempsalary},
lowtempsalary = #{lowtempsalary},
nightshiftsalary = #{nightshiftsalary},
othersalary = #{othersalary},
fullattendancesalary = #{fullattendancesalary},
absencesalary = #{absencesalary},
totalsalary = #{totalsalary},
tax = #{tax},
social = #{social},
accumulation = #{accumulation},
otherdeduction = #{otherdeduction},
unionfees = #{unionfees},
actualitysalary = #{actualitysalary},
signuser = #{signuser},
createtime = #{createtime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from hrm_salary_export where year = #{year} and month=#{month}
mapper.select:
select * from ( select xh, year, month, years, empname, sex, entrytime, dept as deptname, post, normaldays, absencehours as absencehours, overtime as overtime, basicsalary, postsalary, dutiessalary, hightempsalary, lowtempsalary, nightshiftsalary, othersalary, fullattendancesalary, overtimesalary, absencesalary, totalsalary, tax, social, accumulation, otherdeduction, unionfees, actualitysalary, signuser, performance,1 AS data_type from hrm_salary_export where year=#{year} and month = #{month}
union all
select '' as xh, '' as year, '' as month, '' as years, '小计' as empname, '' as sex, '' as entrytime, dept as deptname, '' as post, '' as normaldays, sum(absencehours) as absencehours, sum(overtime) as overtime, sum(basicsalary) as basicsalary, sum(postsalary) as postsalary, sum(dutiessalary) as dutiessalary, sum(hightempsalary) as hightempsalary, sum(lowtempsalary) as lowtempsalary, sum(nightshiftsalary) as nightshiftsalary, sum(othersalary) as othersalary, sum(fullattendancesalary) as fullattendancesalary, sum(overtimesalary) as overtimesalary, sum(absencesalary) as absencesalary, sum(totalsalary) as totalsalary , sum(tax) as tax, sum(social) as social, sum(accumulation) as accumulation, sum(otherdeduction) as otherdeduction, sum(unionfees) as unionfees, sum(actualitysalary) as actualitysalary, '' as signuser, sum(performance) as performance, 2 AS data_type from hrm_salary_export where year=#{year} and month = #{month} group by dept ) T1 left join hrm_dept T2 on T1.deptname = T2.name
order by T2. sortno
